CustomField.formula: IF( AND(TEXT(InquiryApprovalStatus__c) = "未申請", TEXT(ResultContactStatus__c) = "未申請", CustomInquiryApprovalStatus__c = "未申請"), 0 , IF(OR( CONTAINS(TEXT(ResultContactStatus__c ),"所属"), TEXT(ResultContactStatus__c ) = "TL", TEXT(ResultContactStatus__c ) = "事管推担当", CONTAINS(TEXT( InquiryApprovalStatus__c ),"所属"), TEXT(InquiryApprovalStatus__c ) = "TL", TEXT(InquiryApprovalStatus__c ) = "事管推担当", CONTAINS(CustomInquiryApprovalStatus__c ,"申請部門")),18,24) )
CustomField.label: 未承認アラートカテゴリ
